ChangeRequest.name: Derivatives - Hedge accounting. At cost based method or LOCOM
ChangeRequest.comment:
~"Status::open" ~"Assignment status::ready for assignment"
# Overview
In Finrep template F 11.02, it is required to specify whether the accounting classification for a Derivative is equal to 'Hedge accounting' that in the LDM we can consider covered by either `Over the counter (OTC) Derivative as a hedge` (subtype of `Over the counter (OTC) Derivative role`) or by `Exchange tradable derivative position as a hedge` (subtype of or `Exchange tradable derivative position role`) or 'Hedge accounting. At cost based method or LOCOM' that is currently not covered.
I would propose to add the attribute Accounting classification also at the level of the hedge role (`Over the counter (OTC) Derivative as a hedge` ,`Exchange tradable derivative position as a hedge` ), similarly to what we have for asset and liabilities, with members '_Hedge accounting'_ and '_Hedge accounting. At cost based method or LOCOM'._
The only obstacle at this solution would be that `Over the counter (OTC) Derivative as a hedge` includes already an attribute called `Accounting hedge indicator`, but why this indicator was not added also to exchange tradable derivatives?
### Contact person
_\[_[_arianna.nuvoli@ecb.europa.eu_](mailto:me@ecb.europa.eu)_\]_
